ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot gently placing an umbrella (represented by arm movements) onto the ground.  The action is slow and deliberate, emphasizing the careful placement.  The robot's arms are straight and end in a hand-like structure, so the 'placement' is an approximation. Frame 1 shows the arms raised, preparing to set down the umbrella. Frame 2 shows the arms beginning to descend. Frame 3 shows the arms almost touching the ground. Frame 4 shows the umbrella (arms) resting on the ground.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, holding the umbrella high
arms begin a slow, controlled descent
arms lower further, nearing the ground
arms rest gently on the ground, umbrella placed
